name: last30days
description: Research any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, GitHub, and the web.

interface.shortDescription: Research what people are saying about a topic now.
interface.longDescription: last30days adds a Codex skill for researching any topic based on recent discussion and engagement signals across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, GitHub, and the web.
